accepted.reason: Binary header field parsing uses tight byte-slicing loops and is a practical systems-style kernel.

Binary token and float-row decoding is a realistic data-loading workload with repeated byte-level operations.
Rolling statistics and normalization steps are common predictive-maintenance preprocessing kernels.
